title: enrichment-candidates.json (v2)
description: On-disk format for <repo>/.archigraph/enrichment-candidates.json. Extends v1 (internal/enrichment/candidates.go) with the repair_edge kind required by ADR-0015. v1 readers may safely skip-by-kind on unknown kinds.

schema_version.description: Bumped from 1 -> 2 by ADR-0015. The constant matches CandidatesSchemaVersion in internal/enrichment/candidates.go.

generated_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the index run that produced this file.

repo_id.description: Stable repo identifier used by the indexer (e.g. cross-repo namespace from ADR-0009).

id.description: Deterministic candidate ID. For repair_edge candidates the ID is derived from edge_id; see context.edge_id.

subject_id.description: Local entity id (NOT prefixed with repo). For repair_edge candidates this is the from_entity id.

context.description: Kind-specific payload. For kind=repair_edge see RepairEdgeContext.

edge_id.description: sha256(from_id || relation || original_stub)[:16] prefixed with 'er:'. Stable across runs while the source line stays put; mutates when from_entity's content hash changes (this is the staleness signal).

original_stub.description: The unbound target string the resolver produced (e.g. 'Kind:Name', 'pkg.func', bare name).

disposition_reason.description: Stable enum tag indicating *why* the resolver couldn't bind. Values produced by internal/resolve/refs.go classification.

candidates.description: Plausible local binding targets the agent can choose from. Present for bug-resolver dispositions, empty for bug-extractor.

hint.description: One-line label: kind + qualified name + file:line.

score.description: Heuristic match strength produced by the resolver.

context_window.description: Source excerpt for agent reasoning. Window is centered on from_entity.line.

extracted_metadata.description: Resolver-extracted context the agent should consider.
